model_comparison: Both models failed the fundamental prerequisite of Content Accuracy. Model 1 ignored the target sentence entirely and generated a long, creative description of the scene. Additionally, Model 2's rhythm was not 'brisk' as requested; it was slow and flat. Since both models failed to produce the correct text script, they are both assigned a score of 0 based on the 'Completely incorrect' criteria for content consistency.
